source.extractionMethod: Figma MCP (get_metadata + get_design_context + get_variable_defs + get_screenshot) — sample-first 8-cell walk + pattern extrapolation

spec.name: BUNDLE_SPEC.md
spec.status: v0.2.0 LOCKED for atom phase + v0.3.0 DRAFT (additive)
patches: SP-3 textDecoration captured independent of typography token
SP-4 extension (v0.3.0): $bindingStatus gains 'semantically-mismatched' value for cross-axis token bindings
SP-7 clipsContent always emitted + bindings.size all 7 fields mandatory
SP-8 tokens extractor unions nested-INSTANCE variable refs
SP-9 (v0.3.0): motionReduce policy on animation declarations

counts.$comment: PoC coverage. Full extraction targets variantCellsCoverage=1.0; pending Step 3 full + Steps 5/6.

$modesNote: Dark mode not yet extracted. Apollo v2 may or may not ship dark; pending use_figma plugin-context call.

checksum.$comment: SHA256 over the file bytes at bundle-emit time. Consumers MAY verify on load to detect tampering or partial fetches. Regenerate when any file changes (`shasum -a 256 <path>`).

smokeTests.name: Inline-context render (bindings level)
smokeTests.failureClass: source-DS gap — Apollo v2 Button.Link typography breaks inline-in-body-text. See audit-findings-for-source.md Finding 1.

smokeTests.name: Cell-level node-tree render
smokeTests.result: 17/17 expectations matched (1 spec-enabled self-correction on asymmetric padding)

knownGaps.description: 261 of 264 cells not yet emitted as full node trees. Bindings-level rendering works via Button.component.json's bindings map.

knownGaps.resolution: use_figma plugin-context call to iterate variable.valuesByMode

knownGaps.description: Tokens emitted with resolved values; deep alias chains may be flattened
knownGaps.resolution: use_figma plugin call OR upstream MCP improvement

extensions.$comment: Consumer-recommended load order for progressive disclosure. SKILL.md → MANIFEST.json gets the consumer oriented in <2KB. References/ markdown summaries load next (~5KB total). Full JSON data loads only when a specific cell/token render is requested.
